title: Luffy Is Sinking
description: On pages 2–5, luffy is sinking focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Kuroobi, Nojiko as luffy becomes trapped in the sea, forcing Sanji and the others to split their attention between saving him and winning the fight.
scene: On pages 2–5, luffy is sinking focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Kuroobi, Nojiko as luffy becomes trapped in the sea, forcing Sanji and the others to split their attention between saving him and winning the fight.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: With your injuries, you'll end up dying if you jump into the sea!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Shut up! That guy's at his limit already!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I don't have time to wait for your fight to end!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I know we don't have any time left.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I know that better than anyone so say no more!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I'll go in so you can quit your compl- aiming!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: How into- resting! A human dares challenge me to an under- water battle!?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: That's exactly what they want you to do!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Shaha haha! It's time for you humans to know your place!

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
